response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering skills across multiple domains, this role requires deep expertise in embedded network security, Linux kernel development, and native-level Japanese—none of which are evident in the resume. His background is primarily in web/full-stack development with limited recent C programming and no embedded networking or security product experience. The missing Japanese language requirement alone is a disqualifying factor for a role explicitly listing it as a minimum qualification.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (20 years) with demonstrated mastery of software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, code quality)
Proven ability to work across diverse technical domains and programming languages, showing strong problem-solving and adaptability
Staff-level experience with track record of mentoring, open-source contributions, and ability to communicate technical concepts effectively
concerns: Native-level Japanese language proficiency is a hard requirement; no evidence of Japanese language ability in resume
Career focus on web/full-stack development (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js) with no background in embedded networking, security products, or network switch firmware
Limited recent C programming (last significant role was 2014-2015); no evidence of Linux kernel investigation, source modification, or embedded systems at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of embedded networking security expertise
Strong software engineering fundamentals and extensive experience
